title: oxalis hepatica
intro: Oxalis hepatica, also known as wood sorrel, is a perennial flowering plant in the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions, due to its high content of oxalic acid and other compounds. The health benefits of Oxalis hepatica include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe sore throats, reduce swelling, and support the immune system. Oxalis hepatica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
